name: Lentil - Potato Burgers
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees.
2. Saute the onion and celery in water for about 10 minutes.
3. Combine the sauteed onion and celery with the remaining ingredients in a bowl and mix well.
4. Form the mixture into patties and place on a nonstick baking sheet.
5. Bake for 20 minutes, then turn the patties and bake for an additional 20 minutes.
6. Serve hot on toasted whole wheat burger buns.
